programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Ben's little brother and his wife secretly buy a fixer-upper and plan to renovate it themselves to save money; as they move and race to finish before their third baby arrives, Ben and Erin try to convince them to accept some help.

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: A heads-up from a junkman gives Kamohai and Tristyn the chance to buy a house with a $1 million view; they tackle walls full of bees, rat infestations and water damage to turn a disaster into a luxurious, modern masterpiece.
